messages.content:
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="3">
<summary>Thought for 3 seconds</summary>
>  **Considering Table Structure**
> 
> I'm working on structuring a LaTeX table for an ablation study. I'm focusing on model comparisons with columns for Model, Cold Start, Reinforcement Learning, Reward type, and in/out-of-domain performance. I'm thinking about how to represent the "Cold Start" and "RL" features with checkmarks or crosses.
> 
> 
> **Deciding Model Labels**
> 
> I'm now comparing various label approaches for the "Model" column. I'm leaning towards descriptive labels, as they seem best for clarity. Considering options like "SFT," "RL only," "Ours (Sparse)," and "Ours (Full)," and how they make the model's setup immediately apparent. I'm also thinking of removing the column if all rows are self-explanatory.
> 
> 
> **Exploring Column Labeling Choices**
> 
> I've been evaluating different strategies for labeling the "Model" column, focusing on the trade-offs between conciseness and clarity. I'm currently leaning towards descriptive labels, and I've drafted multiple variations. My current front-runner is the "Drafting Suggestion 2 (Ablation names)", I'll need to justify the reasoning. This will aid in the choice of column name. Next I will refine the LaTeX code.
> 
> 
</details>
将表格中的数字序号（1, 2, 3, 4）替换为**更具描述性的标签（Descriptive Labels）**，可以显著提高论文的可读性，让读者一眼看出每行实验的核心差异。

以下是几种修改方案及对应的 LaTeX 代码：

### 方案一：根据实验设置命名（最推荐）
这种方式直接反映了消融实验的变量，读者不需要查阅表头就能理解每行的含义。

| 修改前 | 修改后 (建议) | 含义 |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 1 | **SFT Baseline** | 仅有基础微调，无冷启动和 RL |
| 2 | **RL w/o CS** | 只有 RL，没有冷启动 (Cold Start) |
| 3 | **RL + Sparse** | 有冷启动，但使用稀疏奖励 |
| 4 | **Full Model** | 完整模型 (或用 **Ours**) |

### 方案二：使用组合缩写
如果空间有限，可以使用简洁的缩写。
*   **Base** (基础)
*   **RL-only** (仅强化学习)
*   **CS + RL (S)** (冷启动+稀疏奖励)
*   **CS + RL (D)** (冷启动+稠密奖励 - 完整版)

---

### 修改后的 LaTeX 代码 (基于方案一)

我已经优化了第一列的名称，并稍微调整了对齐方式，使其看起来更专业：

```latex
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\footnotesize
\caption{\textbf{Ablation study on training stages and reward design}. We investigate the impact of the cold-start phase and the granularity of the reward signal. $\mathcal{R}_{\text{dense}}$ denotes our proposed fine-grained Data Verifier score, while $\mathcal{R}_{\text{sparse}}$ represents a constant success reward for valid execution.}
\label{tab:abla}
\scalebox{0.76}{
\begin{tabular}{l ccc cc}
\toprule
\multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Configuration}} & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Cold Start}} & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{RL}} & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Reward}} & \multicolumn{2}{c}{\textbf{Performance} ($\mathrm{DVS}_{\mathrm{avg}@32}$)} \\
\cmidrule(lr){5-6}
& & &  & \textbf{In-Domain} & \textbf{Out-of-Domain} \\
\midrule
SFT Baseline & $\times$ & $\times$ & - & 4.1 & 5.5 \\
RL (w/o CS) & $\times$ & $\checkmark$ & $\mathcal{R}_{\text{dense}}$ & 32.9 & 23.9 \\
RL + CS (Sparse) & $\checkmark$ & $\checkmark$ & $\mathcal{R}_{\text{sparse}}$ & 62.7 & 44.1 \\
\rowcolor{MyGray} \textbf{Full Model (Ours)} & $\checkmark$ & $\checkmark$ & $\mathcal{R}_{\text{dense}}$ & \textbf{63.2} & \textbf{46.8} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
}
\vspace{-4pt}
\end{table}
```

### 主要改动说明：
1.  **Model -> Configuration**: 将列名改为 "Configuration" 或 "Method"，显得更严谨。
2.  **具体名称**:
    *   第一行改为 `SFT Baseline`。
    *   第二行改为 `RL (w/o CS)`，直接指出缺失了 Cold Start。
    *   第三行改为 `RL + CS (Sparse)`，明确是稀疏奖励。
    *   第四行改为 `\textbf{Full Model (Ours)}`，突出这是你的最终方案。
3.  **加粗强调**: 对最后一行（你的提议方法）进行加粗，配合背景色，视觉引导效果更好。

### 替代方案：如果不想用文字
如果你觉得文字太挤，也可以用代号（但比 1, 2, 3 好）：
*   **M$_{SFT}$**
*   **M$_{RL}$**
*   **M$_{Sparse}$**
*   **M$_{Full}$**

**建议：** 方案一（文字描述）在顶会论文（如 ACL, EMNLP, NeurIPS）中最常见，因为它能让审稿人在扫视表格时节省认知成本。

\noindent
\textbf{Collaborating with Strong Coder.}
\label{sec:coll}
Given the proliferation of specialized coding models, a natural idea is to decouple this task: use the primary model as a planner (natural language orchestration) and an external coder for implementation.
%
Table~\ref{tab:coder} shows that this paradigm enhances inference-time performance, with Qwen3-32B paired with Kimi-K2-Instruct yielding 18.0\% and 14.5\% $\mathrm{DVS}_{\mathrm{avg}@32}$ gains on in-domain and out-of-domain tasks, respectively.
However, training the model solely as a planner leads to suboptimal results compared to the end-to-end approach.
%
This suggests that integrated training of planning and coding capabilities is essential for optimal data recipe generation.

这段文字目前的表达是清晰的，但显得稍微有些口语化（例如 "natural idea"），且句子之间的逻辑连接可以更紧密一些，以增强学术性。

以下提供三个版本的修改建议，你可以根据论文的篇幅和风格选择：

### 版本一：更加学术化与流畅（推荐）
这个版本替换了一些较为普通的词汇（如 "natural idea" -> "investigate the potential"），并强化了“尽管推理时有效，但训练时分离会导致性能下降”这一对比逻辑。

```latex
\noindent
\textbf{Collaborating with Strong Coder.}
\label{sec:coll}
Given the rapid advancements in specialized coding models, we investigate a decoupled paradigm: employing the primary model as a high-level planner for natural language orchestration while offloading implementation to an external expert coder.
%
Table~\ref{tab:coder} demonstrates that this collaboration enhances inference-time performance; specifically, pairing Qwen3-32B with Kimi-K2-Instruct yields gains of 18.0\% and 14.5\% in $\mathrm{DVS}_{\mathrm{avg}@32}$ on in-domain and out-of-domain tasks, respectively.
%
However, we observe that training the model exclusively as a planner results in inferior performance compared to the end-to-end approach.
%
This finding underscores that the integrated training of planning and coding capabilities is indispensable for optimal data recipe generation.
```

### 版本二：更精简干练（适合节省篇幅）
如果你的论文篇幅紧张，可以使用这个版本，去掉了冗余的修饰词，直接陈述实验结果。

```latex
\noindent
\textbf{Collaborating with Strong Coder.}
\label{sec:coll}
We explore decoupling the generation process by using the primary model as a planner and an external model as a coder.
%
Table~\ref{tab:coder} shows that while this approach improves inference performance (e.g., Qwen3-32B with Kimi-K2-Instruct achieves 18.0\% and 14.5\% $\mathrm{DVS}_{\mathrm{avg}@32}$ gains), training the model solely for planning significantly underperforms the end-to-end baseline.
%
These results suggest that co-training planning and coding skills is essential for effective data recipe generation.
```

### 版本三：微调（保持原意）
如果你觉得原意表达最准确，只想修正语法和词汇搭配：

```latex
\noindent
\textbf{Collaborating with Strong Coder.}
\label{sec:coll}
Given the proliferation of specialized coding models, a compelling strategy is to decouple the task by using the primary model as a planner (for orchestration) and an external coder for implementation.
%
As shown in Table~\ref{tab:coder}, this paradigm boosts inference-time performance, with Qwen3-32B paired with Kimi-K2-Instruct achieving 18.0\% and 14.5\% improvements in $\mathrm{DVS}_{\mathrm{avg}@32}$ on in-domain and out-of-domain tasks, respectively.
%
Nevertheless, restricting the model's training to planning alone leads to suboptimal results compared to the end-to-end method.
%
This suggests that an integrated training strategy encompassing both planning and coding is crucial for robust performance.
```

### 主要修改点解析：
1.  **"Natural idea" $\to$ "Decoupled paradigm" / "Compelling strategy"**: "Natural idea" 在论文中略显随意，用 "paradigm"（范式）或 "strategy"（策略）更正式。
2.  **"Decouple this task"**: 补充了具体的做法，比如 "offloading implementation"（卸载/外包实现部分），表述更精准。
3.  **连接词**: 使用 "Nevertheless" 或 "Specifically" 来增强句子前后的逻辑转折和递进。
4.  **"Integrated training"**: 这是一个很好的词，建议保留，我在推荐版本中加强了它的语气（"is indispensable"）。

“Training Paradigm”这个词本身没有语法错误，但在学术语境下略显宏大。在这个表格中，你实际上是在对比**“仅推理时的策略（不改变模型权重）”**与**“不同的训练策略（改变模型权重）”**。

为了让表格逻辑更严密，同时配合正文的叙述，我建议做以下调整：

### 1. 标题措辞建议

*   **Inference-Time** $\rightarrow$ 保持不变，或者改为 **Off-the-shelf Models** (现成模型)，强调未经过你的训练。
*   **Training Paradigm** $\rightarrow$ 建议改为 **Training Strategy** (训练策略) 或 **Fine-tuning Approaches** (微调方法)。因为这里对比的是“只训练Planner”和“端到端训练”两种具体的策略。

### 2. 模型名称优化

*   **Planner-32B** $\rightarrow$ 这个名字有点模糊。建议改为 **Planner-Only SFT** 或 **Decoupled SFT**，这样读者一看就知道这个模型只被训练做了Planner。
*   **DataChef-32B** $\rightarrow$ 建议加上 **(Ours)** 或 **End-to-End SFT**，以强调这是最终方案。

### 3. 表格改进代码

以下是修改后的版本，不仅优化了措辞，还调整了缩进和对齐，使层次更清晰：

```latex
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\small
\caption{Analysis of collaborating with strong coding models. We compare simple inference-time collaboration against training strategies where the planning and coding roles are decoupled vs. integrated.}
\label{tab:coder}
\scalebox{0.72}{
\begin{tabular}{l c cc}
\toprule
\multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Method}} & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{External Coder}} & \multicolumn{2}{c}{\textbf{Performance} ($\mathrm{DVS}_{\mathrm{avg}@32}$)} \\
\cmidrule(lr){3-4}
&  & \textbf{In-Domain} & \textbf{Out-of-Domain} \\
\midrule
\rowcolor{gray!10} \multicolumn{4}{l}{\textit{Inference-Time Collaboration (Base Model)}} \\
Qwen3-32B (Base) & $\times$ & 22.3 & 18.9 \\
Qwen3-32B (Base) & \checkmark & 40.3 & 33.1 \\
\midrule
\rowcolor{gray!10} \multicolumn{4}{l}{\textit{Training Strategy Comparison}} \\
Planner-Only SFT  & \checkmark & 56.7 & 37.3 \\
\textbf{DataChef-32B (Ours)} & $\times$ & \textbf{64.0} & \textbf{44.1} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
}
\vspace{-8pt}
\end{table}
```

### 为什么这样改更好？

1.  **区分度更强**：
    *   上半部分明确标为 `(Base Model)`，说明是用原版模型。
    *   下半部分标为 `Training Strategy`，暗示这里的模型权重已经被修改了。
2.  **逻辑闭环**：
    *   `Planner-Only SFT` 这一行配合 `External Coder: checkmark`，完美对应了你正文中提到的 "training the model solely as a planner leads to suboptimal results"。
    *   `DataChef (Ours)` 这一行配合 `External Coder: cross`，强调了你的模型**不需要**外挂代码模型就能达到最佳效果（Integrated training 的优势）。

### 配合正文的微调建议

如果使用了新的表格命名，正文对应部分也可以稍微呼应一下（加粗部分为修改点）：

> ... However, **adopting a decoupled training strategy** (i.e., **Planner-Only SFT**) leads to suboptimal results compared to the end-to-end approach...

这样正文和表格中的术语就完全对齐了。
